top_signals.title: Northern Lights CCS Fleet Grows with First Bernard Schulte's LCO2 Carrier
top_signals.summary: Bernhard Schulte has christened its first liquefied CO2 (LCO2) carrier, marking the company’s entry into the carbon capture and storage (CCS)-related shipping segment.The vessel, named Northern Purpose, was christened on May 19 at Dalian Shipbuilding…
